item.title: Monster Legends Runes & Relics Guide: Best Rune Builds, Crafting & Optimization (2026)
item.description: Complete Monster Legends runes and relics guide. Rune types ranked, best attacker tank support builds, relic crafting recipes, and optimization strategies.
